originalAlarm.description: Memory dynamically allocated by `malloc` on line 1878 is not freed after the last access at line 1878, column 2.

sanitizedDescription: Memory dynamically allocated by `malloc` on line 1878 is not freed after the last access at line 1878, column 2.
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP () Bool
  false)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __malloc_and_calloc_defined () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Memory leak: buf allocated by malloc at L26 is never freed when CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP=F (free is inside the CLEAN_UP block at L31). Genuine memory leak. Same bug as TRANSFORMATION_57 (CSA dead store) and TRANSFORMATION_96 (Pulse dead store), detected here by Pulse MEMORY_LEAK_C. No // ERROR for this scenario, new bug. PC = !CLEAN_UP AND !_STDLIB_H AND !__malloc_and_calloc_defined: restrictive library macros over-constrain the PC.
